name: Quaker's: Wholesome Apple Raisin Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup QUAKER Oats uncooked (quick or old fashioned)
1/2 cup Apple juice or skim milk
2 Egg whites or 1 egg, slightly beaten
1/4 cup QUAKER Oats uncooked (quick or old fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Line 12 muffin cups with paper baking cups or spray the bottoms only with a no-stick cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, combine dry ingredients including raisins and mix well.
4. Add the combined applesauce, apple juice, egg whites (or beaten egg), and oil, mixing until just combined.
5. Fill each muffin cup almost full with batter.
6. Sprinkle the remaining 1/4 cup oats evenly over the batter and gently pat down.
7. Bake for 20 to 22 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Allow muffins to cool in the pan for a few minutes before removing them.
